overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person exploration of a homeless encampment beneath a rainy highway overpass at night. The scene opens with two characters interacting by a campfire before the player walks through makeshift tents toward a neon-lit commercial street.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night under a concrete highway overpass where two characters stand near a burning barrel fire. One character dances energetically around the flames while the other watches, with makeshift tents and neon city lights visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned encampment area with scattered tents and debris

moving away from fire light into darker areas of the encampment

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the encampment examining the tents and surroundings

stacked wooden crates and containers near the tent

segments.scene_description: The player character begins walking through the encampment, circling past the campfire and moving between makeshift tents. The two characters disappear from view as the camera explores the deserted area, revealing metal fencing and scattered supply crates under the concrete overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with food vendor and neon signage

events.description: moving from under the overpass toward the open street area
approaching bright neon pink signage and street lights

agents.ego_description: walking toward the FOODSCAPE building and the street beyond

entered.detail: commercial building with red neon FOODSCAPE signage
large outdoor umbrella with vertical pink neon light tube
construction barriers with red and white stripes blocking the street
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a more open street area, approaching a building with bright red FOODSCAPE neon signage. A large umbrella with pink neon lighting dominates the center frame while red and white construction barriers line the street, with palm trees visible in the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a gritty, rain-slicked homeless encampment into the neon-lit commercial district of a futuristic city. It begins under a concrete highway overpass where a character dances energetically beside a burning barrel fire amidst makeshift tents. As the camera moves forward, it circles past the flames and weaves through the deserted encampment, passing metal fencing and scattered supply crates. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from beneath the overpass and enters a wider street lined with red and white construction barriers. Finally, the view shifts toward a building topped with bright red Foodscape signage and a large pink neon umbrella, with palm trees fading into the foggy distance.
